title: SIMPLE FPS DISPLAY
description: Simple fps display mod that offers toggle command and 2 shadow text.
body:
## ✨ Features
Displays FPS using **double-shadow text** for better readability.
Uses the font from your current texture pack for seamless integration.
### Can be toggled with:
_/togglefps_

## 🧑‍💻 Designed For
Players who want a minimal FPS counter.
Anyone who prefers in-game performance info without external overlays.

## 📥 Installation
1. Install Minecraft Forge 1.8.9
1. Put the mod .jar file into your mods folder
1. Launch the game
1. Let me know if you want to expand it with screenshots or config info.
